source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Acute Rhinosinusitis
source.population: People with acute rhinosinusitis symptoms; chronic, invasive fungal, and complicated disease require different pathways.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.

source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines duration patterns and lists congestion, discharge, postnasal drip, dental discomfort, facial pain or pressure, fever, fatigue, cough, smell change, and headache.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Acute Rhinosinusitis
source.population: People with acute rhinosinusitis symptoms; chronic, invasive fungal, and complicated disease require different pathways.

assessment.rationale: Supports mapped visual, swelling, severe headache, mental-status, fever, unilateral, and immunocompromise warning fields.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Acute Rhinosinusitis
source.population: People with acute rhinosinusitis symptoms; chronic, invasive fungal, and complicated disease require different pathways.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth acute-rhinosinusitis documentation; partial for all chronic sinus and facial-pain causes.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists high fever, frontal or periorbital swelling, severe headache, meningeal or mental-status change, visual change, and persistent unilateral or bloody symptoms.

assessment.text: Limits imaging and other tests to clinician-selected contexts and lists emergency, specialist, systemic-illness, and non-response referral criteria.
assessment.rationale: Supports mapped clinician-selected imaging, return, escalation, and follow-up documentation.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Acute Rhinosinusitis
source.population: People with acute rhinosinusitis symptoms; chronic, invasive fungal, and complicated disease require different pathways.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth acute-rhinosinusitis documentation; partial for all chronic sinus and facial-pain causes.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Limits imaging and other tests to clinician-selected contexts and lists emergency, specialist, systemic-illness, and non-response referral criteria.

assessment.text: Provides clinician-led conservative and pharmacological management choices; no dose-bearing content is mapped into this project.
assessment.rationale: Supports mapped clinician-documented symptom care, medicine decisions, questions, and management discussions without doses.

rewrites.final_wording: Lists high fever, frontal or periorbital swelling, severe headache, meningeal or mental-status change, visual change, and persistent unilateral or bloody symptoms.
